steps.t: More arrows are needed for the defence of Iridír. The fletcher, Tínsha, can be found at the east end of the crafters' wharf.
More arrows are needed for the defence of Iridír. Tínsha has requested that you bring her a crate of arrowheads from Gurtum, the arrowsmith. The smith…
More arrows are needed for the defence of Iridír. The fletcher has requested that you bring her a crate of arrowheads from the arrowsmith.
More arrows are needed for the defence of Iridír. The arrowsmith, Gurtum, has given you leave to take a crate of arrowheads to the fletcher, Tínsha.

More arrows are needed for the defence of Iridír. The fletcher has given you leave to take the tub of arrows to the Dumûri captain, Dalagín. Dalagín i…
More arrows are needed for the defence of Iridír. The fletcher has provided a tub of arrows that you brought to Dalagín. You should talk to her.
